name: Zucchini Parmesean Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix lemon juice and milk; set aside.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F.
3. Grease a 9x5 loaf pan.
4. In a bowl, combine flour, zucchini, sugar, cheese, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
5. In a saucepan, melt margarine; stir in milk and lemon juice, eggs, and onion until smooth.
6. Add the liquid mixture to the dry mixture just until combined.
7. Spread the batter in the prepared pan.
8. Bake 55-60 minutes, or until a toothpick comes out clean and the loaf pulls away from the sides of the pan.
